evals.name: Java JNDI Injection + XML XXE Detection
evals.description: Test CWE detection for Java code with JNDI injection and XXE vulnerabilities, mapping to OWASP A03, NIST SI-10, and EU AI Act Article 15
evals.validation: Must detect CWE-917 (JNDI Injection) and CWE-611 (XXE), map to OWASP A03/A08, NIST SI-10, EU AI Act Article 15

evals.name: Python Pickle Deserialization + SQL Injection
evals.description: Test detection of unsafe pickle deserialization and SQL injection in Python, mapping to OWASP A08/A03, NIST SI-10, EU AI Act Article 15

input.code:
import pickle
import sqlite3
from flask import request

@app.route('/process', methods=['POST'])
def process_data():
    # CWE-502: Deserialization of Untrusted Data
    user_data = request.get_json()
    obj = pickle.loads(user_data['serialized_obj'])  # VULNERABLE: unsafe pickle
    
    # CWE-89: SQL Injection
    user_id = request.args.get('user_id')
    db = sqlite3.connect(':memory:')
    cursor = db.cursor()
    query = f"SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = {user_id}"  # VULNERABLE: string concat
    cursor.execute(query)
    return cursor.fetchall()

evals.validation: Must detect CWE-502 (pickle.loads) and CWE-89 (SQL injection), map to OWASP A08/A03, NIST SI-10/SI-7, EU AI Act Article 15

evals.name: Mixed 5-CWE Findings - Full Compliance Matrix
evals.description: Test generation of compliance matrix from 5 CWE findings: CWE-89, CWE-502, CWE-798, CWE-862, CWE-287. Should produce complete matrix across all 6+ frameworks
evals.validation: Must produce matrix showing all affected frameworks, prioritize Critical CWEs, and indicate non-compliance status across OWASP/NIST/EU AI Act/ISO 27001/SOC 2
